muhammad-sawood.name: Muhammad Sawood
muhammad-sawood.title: Threat Intelligence Analyst | Adversary Hunter | Security Researcher
muhammad-sawood.bio: Experienced Threat Intelligence Analyst and Adversary Hunter specializing in uncovering APT group infrastructures. As a Security Researcher, I share in-depth insights and discoveries through published research on diverse cybersecurity topics.

sarah-jawaid.name: Sarah Jawaid
sarah-jawaid.title: Intelligence Analyst | Threat Researcher
sarah-jawaid.bio: Threat Researcher and Intelligence Analyst focused on turning complex cyber threats into clear, actionable intelligence that helps organizations stay ahead of adversaries.
